action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Doyle, J. Jacobson, Snodgrass, Andraca, Sinicki, Neubauer, Joers, Hong, Roe, Spaude, DeSmidt, Hysell, Emerson, Madison, Stubbs, Palmeri, Phelps, Moore Omokunde and Stroud; 
cosponsored by Senators Roys, Drake, L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Larson, Spreitzer and Hesselbein
